title: kadua cordata subsp. remyi
intro: Kadua cordata subsp. remyi, also known as Kadua remyi, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Kadua cordata subsp. remyi are believed to include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and nausea. Kadua cordata subsp. remyi can be prepared in various forms, including tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
